proposal.value: Design the official brand logo for 'MetaCortex Datacentres', an enterprise AI-infrastructure provider. A flat, solid-fill geometric hexagonal mark, strictly devoid of internal lines, circuit traces, glowing effects, or patterns. Include the wordmark 'METACORTEX' beneath it in clean, high-contrast, sans-serif typography. Palette: deep emerald green mark, graphite black text, cool white background. Vector style only, no photography, no extra text, consistent across all applications.
proposal.rationale: Explicitly forbidding internal patterns and variants in the prompt addresses the recurring 'circuit-trace' and 'glowing' defect patterns identified by the judge.
